description: Generate code-map.json from requirements and investigation
instructions: Prepend the skill_check_prompt to your task prompt when invoking the Task tool
skill_check_prompt:
MANDATORY: Before doing ANY work, you MUST create a todo list with TodoWrite containing:

Todo 1 (status: pending): "Check available skills for matches"
Todo 2 (status: pending): "Execute the main task"

You MUST complete Todo 1 FIRST by:
1. Check if ANY of your available skills match this task by examining descriptions
2. If skills match → Mark Todo 1 complete, invoke them with Skill tool
3. If NO skills match → Mark Todo 1 complete, proceed to Todo 2

After skill check, proceed with your actual task:
